title: Any way to filter for Items done on a certain date/today etc without complex automations?
excerpt: Hi all, Just wondering if anybody knows of a simple way to filter Items based on done date - without using an Automation.  I know I can achieve this by setting a “Done date” column to today when Status changes to Done, b…

posts.author: botsquad (Patrick Fallon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, Just wondering if anybody knows of a simple way to filter Items based on done date - without using an Automation. I know I can achieve this by setting a “Done date” column to today when Status changes to Done, but this makes my board more complex and more importantly, burns through a whole lot of automation actions.
i tried using the “Last updated” and “creation log” columns but it seems the only thing you can filter with them is the user who updated./created, not the date the change was made.
Any ideas?
Cheers, Patrick

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Patrick,

Can our advanced filter settings help you with this? It may not necessarily be this filter, but there are a range of options you can choose from when filtering the date…
